In [ ]:
import polars as pl
import pandas as pd
import pycountry_convert as pc
import pycountry
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")

from plotnine import (
    ggplot, aes,
    geom_col, geom_line, geom_point, geom_smooth,
    geom_boxplot, geom_violin, geom_hline, geom_text,
    facet_wrap,
    theme_minimal, theme_void, theme,
    element_text, element_blank, element_rect, element_line,
    labs,
    scale_fill_manual, scale_color_manual,
    scale_fill_brewer, scale_color_brewer,
    scale_color_cmap, scale_fill_cmap,
    scale_size_continuous,
    scale_x_continuous, scale_y_continuous,
    scale_x_log10,
    coord_flip,
    guides, guide_legend, guide_colorbar,
)

# ── Continent mapper ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def get_continent(alpha2: str) -> str:
    try:
        code = pc.country_alpha2_to_continent_code(alpha2)
        return pc.convert_continent_code_to_continent_name(code)
    except Exception:
        return "Unknown"

# ── UNICEF brand colours ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
UNICEF_BLUE   = "#1CABE2"
UNICEF_YELLOW = "#FFC20E"
PALETTE_CONT  = ["#1CABE2", "#E2711D", "#80BD41", "#FFC20E", "#7B2D8B", "#D7263D"]
CONT_LABELS   = ["Africa", "Asia", "Europe", "North America", "Oceania", "South America"]

# ── Shared custom theme ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def unicef_theme():
    return (
        theme_minimal()
        + theme(
            plot_title       = element_text(size=14, face="bold",  color="#1d3557"),
            plot_subtitle    = element_text(size=11,               color="#457b9d"),
            axis_title       = element_text(size=10,               color="#333333"),
            axis_text        = element_text(size=9,                color="#555555"),
            legend_title     = element_text(size=10, face="bold",  color="#1d3557"),
            legend_text      = element_text(size=9,                color="#333333"),
            legend_background= element_rect(fill="white", color="#cccccc", size=0.4),
            legend_key       = element_rect(fill="white"),
            panel_grid_minor = element_blank(),
            panel_grid_major = element_line(color="#eeeeee"),
            panel_background = element_rect(fill="white"),
            plot_background  = element_rect(fill="white"),
            strip_text       = element_text(size=9, face="bold", color="#1d3557"),
        )
    )

# ── Country centroids (lat, lon) for bubble world map ────────────────────────

    "GH":(7.95,-1.02),"GR":(39.07,21.82),"GT":(15.78,-90.23),"GN":(9.95,-11.24),

    "IR":(32.43,53.69),"IQ":(33.22,43.68),"IE":(53.41,-8.24),"IL":(31.05,34.85),
    "IT":(41.87,12.57),"JM":(18.11,-77.30),"JP":(36.20,138.25),"JO":(30.59,36.24),

    "MT":(35.94,14.38),"MR":(21.01,-10.94),"MX":(23.63,-102.55),"MD":(47.41,28.37),
    "MN":(46.86,103.85),"ME":(42.71,19.37),"MA":(31.79,-7.09),"MZ":(-18.67,35.53),
    "MM":(21.91,95.96),"NA":(-22.96,18.49),"NP":(28.39,84.12),"NL":(52.13,5.29),
    "NZ":(-40.90,174.89),"NI":(12.87,-85.21),"NE":(17.61,8.08),"NG":(9.08,8.68),

    "US":(37.09,-95.71),"UY":(-32.52,-55.77),"UZ":(41.38,64.59),"VE":(6.42,-66.59),

}
In [ ]:
# ── 1. Load all files with Polars ─────────────────────────────────────────────
ind1_raw = pl.read_csv("unicef_indicator_1.csv")
ind2_raw = pl.read_csv("unicef_indicator_2.csv")
meta_raw = pl.read_csv("unicef_metadata.csv")

# ── 2. Rename time_period → year ──────────────────────────────────────────────
ind1 = ind1_raw.rename({"time_period": "year"})
ind2 = ind2_raw.rename({"time_period": "year"})

# ── 3. Add continent column ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
ind1 = ind1.with_columns(
    pl.col("alpha_2_code")
    .map_elements(get_continent, return_dtype=pl.String)
    .alias("continent")
)
ind2 = ind2.with_columns(
    pl.col("alpha_2_code")
    .map_elements(get_continent, return_dtype=pl.String)
    .alias("continent")
)

# ── 4. Slim metadata and left-join to ind1 on country + year ──────────────────
meta_slim = meta_raw.select([
    "country", "year",
    "GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)",
    "Life expectancy at birth, total (years)",
    "Population, total",
    "Birth rate, crude (per 1,000 people)",
])
ind1_meta = ind1.join(meta_slim, on=["country", "year"], how="left")

# ── 5. Summary statistics for narrative ───────────────────────────────────────
n_countries = ind1["country"].n_unique()
n_years     = ind1["year"].n_unique()
year_min    = ind1["year"].min()
year_max    = ind1["year"].max()
global_avg  = round(ind1["obs_value"].mean(), 2)
africa_avg  = round(ind1.filter(pl.col("continent") == "Africa")["obs_value"].mean(), 2)
europe_avg  = round(ind1.filter(pl.col("continent") == "Europe")["obs_value"].mean(), 2)
gap         = round(europe_avg - africa_avg, 2)
In [ ]:
latest = (
    ind1
    .sort("year", descending=True)
    .group_by("country")
    .agg(
        pl.col("obs_value").first().alias("latest_value"),
        pl.col("alpha_2_code").first(),
        pl.col("continent").first(),
    )
    .to_pandas()
)

cent_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [{"alpha_2_code": k, "lat": v[0], "lon": v[1]} for k, v in CENTROIDS.items()]
)
map_df = latest.merge(cent_df, on="alpha_2_code", how="inner")

(
    ggplot(map_df, aes(x="lon", y="lat", color="latest_value", size="latest_value"))
    + geom_point(alpha=0.82)
    + scale_color_cmap(
        "Blues",
        name="Sanitation\nCoverage (%)",
        limits=[0, map_df["latest_value"].max()],
    )
    + scale_size_continuous(
        range=[1, 14],
        name="Sanitation\nCoverage (%)",
    )
    + guides(
        color=guide_colorbar(title="Sanitation\nCoverage (%)"),
        size=guide_legend(title="Sanitation\nCoverage (%)"),
    )
    + labs(
        title    = "Global Sanitation Coverage — Most Recent Year Available",
        subtitle = "Each bubble = one country · Colour & size both encode coverage (%)",
        x="Longitude", y="Latitude"
    )
    + theme_void()
    + theme(
        plot_title      = element_text(size=13, face="bold", color="#1d3557"),
        plot_subtitle   = element_text(size=10,              color="#457b9d"),
        legend_title    = element_text(size=9,  face="bold", color="#1d3557"),
        legend_text     = element_text(size=8,               color="#333333"),
        legend_position = "right",
        legend_background = element_rect(fill="white", color="#cccccc", size=0.3),
    )
)
In [ ]:
cont_avg = (
    ind1
    .group_by("continent")
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").mean().alias("avg_sanitation"))
    .sort("avg_sanitation", descending=True)
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(cont_avg, aes(x="reorder(continent, avg_sanitation)", y="avg_sanitation", fill="continent"))
    + geom_col(width=0.68, show_legend=True)
    + geom_text(
        aes(label="avg_sanitation"),
        format_string="{:.2f}%",
        ha="left",
        nudge_y=0.08,
        size=9,
        color="#333333",
    )
    + coord_flip()
    + scale_fill_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_y_continuous(limits=[0, 9], name="Average Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Average Sanitation Coverage by Continent (2000–2024)",
        subtitle = "Averaged across all countries and years · Value labels shown at bar ends",
        x        = "",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)
In [ ]:
box_df = ind1.to_pandas()

(
    ggplot(box_df, aes(x="continent", y="obs_value", fill="continent", color="continent"))
    + geom_boxplot(alpha=0.55, outlier_size=1.5, outlier_alpha=0.5)
    + scale_fill_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_y_continuous(name="Sanitation Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Distribution of Sanitation Coverage by Continent",
        subtitle = "Each box summarises all country-year observations · Outliers shown as dots",
        x        = "",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(
        axis_text_x  = element_text(angle=25, hjust=1),
        legend_position = "right",
    )
)
In [ ]:
yearly_global = (
    ind1
    .group_by("year")
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").mean().alias("global_avg"))
    .sort("year")
    .to_pandas()
)

cont_yearly = (
    ind1
    .group_by(["continent", "year"])
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").mean().alias("avg"))
    .sort("year")
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot()
    + geom_line(
        cont_yearly,
        aes(x="year", y="avg", color="continent"),
        size=0.9, alpha=0.75,
    )
    + geom_line(
        yearly_global,
        aes(x="year", y="global_avg"),
        color="#222222", size=1.5, linetype="solid",
    )
    + geom_smooth(
        yearly_global,
        aes(x="year", y="global_avg"),
        method="lm", color=UNICEF_YELLOW, linetype="dashed", size=1.1, se=False,
    )
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_continuous(breaks=list(range(2000, 2025, 4)))
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage Over Time: Global & Per-Continent (2000–2024)",
        subtitle = "Coloured lines = continent averages · Black line = global mean · Dashed yellow = linear trend",
        x        = "Year",
        y        = "Average Coverage (%)",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)
In [ ]:
(
    ggplot(cont_yearly, aes(x="year", y="avg", color="continent"))
    + geom_line(size=1.1)
    + geom_point(size=1.8, alpha=0.8)
    + geom_smooth(method="lm", linetype="dashed", size=0.8, se=False, color="#888888")
    + facet_wrap("continent", ncol=3, scales="free_y")
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_continuous(breaks=[2000, 2008, 2016, 2024])
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage Trajectory by Continent (Faceted)",
        subtitle = "Dashed grey = linear trend per continent · Y-axes free to highlight within-continent change",
        x        = "Year",
        y        = "Avg Coverage (%)",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(
        legend_position = "right",
        axis_text_x     = element_text(size=7, angle=30, hjust=1),
    )
)
In [ ]:
scatter_df = (
    ind1_meta
    .filter(pl.col("GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)").is_not_null())
    .filter(pl.col("obs_value").is_not_null())
    .filter(pl.col("GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)") > 0)
    .select([
        "country", "year", "obs_value", "continent",
        "GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)",
    ])
    .rename({"GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)": "gdp_per_capita"})
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(scatter_df, aes(x="gdp_per_capita", y="obs_value", color="continent"))
    + geom_point(alpha=0.25, size=1.4)
    + geom_smooth(method="lm", se=False, size=1.3)
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_log10(
        name="GDP per Capita — log scale (constant 2015 USD)",
        labels=lambda lst: [f"${int(x/1000)}k" if x >= 1000 else f"${int(x)}" for x in lst],
    )
    + scale_y_continuous(name="Sanitation Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage vs. GDP per Capita (Log Scale)",
        subtitle = "Each point = one country-year · Log scale reveals the relationship across income levels",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)
In [ ]:
le_df = (
    ind1_meta
    .filter(pl.col("Life expectancy at birth, total (years)").is_not_null())
    .filter(pl.col("obs_value").is_not_null())
    .select([
        "country", "year", "obs_value", "continent",
        "Life expectancy at birth, total (years)",
    ])
    .rename({"Life expectancy at birth, total (years)": "life_expectancy"})
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(le_df, aes(x="life_expectancy", y="obs_value", color="continent"))
    + geom_point(alpha=0.25, size=1.4)
    + geom_smooth(method="lm", se=False, size=1.3)
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_continuous(name="Life Expectancy at Birth (years)")
    + scale_y_continuous(name="Sanitation Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage vs. Life Expectancy",
        subtitle = "Countries where people live longer tend to have better sanitation — but causality runs both ways",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)
In [ ]:
br_df = (
    ind1_meta
    .filter(pl.col("Birth rate, crude (per 1,000 people)").is_not_null())
    .filter(pl.col("obs_value").is_not_null())
    .select([
        "country", "year", "obs_value", "continent",
        "Birth rate, crude (per 1,000 people)",
    ])
    .rename({"Birth rate, crude (per 1,000 people)": "birth_rate"})
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(br_df, aes(x="birth_rate", y="obs_value", color="continent"))
    + geom_point(alpha=0.25, size=1.4)
    + geom_smooth(method="lm", se=False, size=1.3)
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_continuous(name="Crude Birth Rate (per 1,000 people)")
    + scale_y_continuous(name="Sanitation Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage vs. Crude Birth Rate",
        subtitle = "Countries with high birth rates — typically the youngest populations — have the lowest sanitation access",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)
In [ ]:
top15 = (
    ind1
    .group_by(["country", "continent"])
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").mean().alias("avg_coverage"))
    .sort("avg_coverage", descending=True)
    .head(15)
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(top15, aes(x="reorder(country, avg_coverage)", y="avg_coverage", fill="continent"))
    + geom_col(width=0.72, show_legend=True)
    + geom_text(
        aes(label="avg_coverage"),
        format_string="{:.1f}%",
        ha="left",
        nudge_y=0.3,
        size=8,
        color="#333333",
    )
    + coord_flip()
    + scale_fill_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_y_continuous(limits=[0, 105], name="Average Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Top 15 Countries: Highest Average Sanitation Coverage (2000–2024)",
        subtitle = "Colour indicates continent · These are the benchmarks others must aspire to",
        x        = "",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)
In [ ]:
hiv_cont_yearly = (
    ind2
    .group_by(["continent", "year"])
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").sum().alias("total_tested"))
    .sort("year")
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(hiv_cont_yearly, aes(x="year", y="total_tested", color="continent"))
    + geom_line(size=1.2)
    + geom_point(size=2.5, alpha=0.9)
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_y_continuous(
        name="Women Tested",
        labels=lambda lst: [
            f"{x/1e6:.1f}M" if x >= 1e6 else f"{int(x/1e3)}K" for x in lst
        ],
    )
    + scale_x_continuous(breaks=list(range(2015, 2025, 2)))
    + labs(
        title    = "HIV ANC Testing Volume by Continent (2015–2024)",
        subtitle = "Total pregnant women tested for HIV at antenatal clinics per year",
        x        = "Year",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)
In [ ]:
hiv_top15 = (
    ind2
    .group_by(["country", "continent"])
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").mean().alias("avg_tested"))
    .sort("avg_tested", descending=True)
    .head(15)
    .to_pandas()
)

hiv_top15["avg_label"] = hiv_top15["avg_tested"].apply(
    lambda x: f"{x/1e6:.2f}M" if x >= 1e6 else f"{int(x/1e3)}K"
)

(
    ggplot(hiv_top15, aes(x="reorder(country, avg_tested)", y="avg_tested", fill="continent"))
    + geom_col(width=0.72, show_legend=True)
    + geom_text(
        aes(label="avg_label"),
        ha="left",
        nudge_y=50000,
        size=8,
        color="#333333",
    )
    + coord_flip()
    + scale_fill_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_y_continuous(
        name="Average Women Tested per Year",
        labels=lambda lst: [
            f"{x/1e6:.0f}M" if x >= 1e6 else f"{int(x/1e3)}K" for x in lst
        ],
        expand=[0, 0, 0.15, 0],
    )
    + labs(
        title    = "Top 15 Countries: HIV ANC Testing Volume",
        subtitle = "Average number of pregnant women tested per year (2015–2024)",
        x        = "",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)
In [ ]:
import polars as pl
import pandas as pd
import pycountry_convert as pc
import pycountry
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")

from plotnine import (
    ggplot, aes,
    geom_col, geom_line, geom_point, geom_smooth,
    geom_boxplot, geom_violin, geom_hline, geom_text,
    facet_wrap,
    theme_minimal, theme_void, theme,
    element_text, element_blank, element_rect, element_line,
    labs,
    scale_fill_manual, scale_color_manual,
    scale_fill_brewer, scale_color_brewer,
    scale_color_cmap, scale_fill_cmap,
    scale_size_continuous,
    scale_x_continuous, scale_y_continuous,
    scale_x_log10,
    coord_flip,
    guides, guide_legend, guide_colorbar,
)

# ── Continent mapper ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def get_continent(alpha2: str) -> str:
    try:
        code = pc.country_alpha2_to_continent_code(alpha2)
        return pc.convert_continent_code_to_continent_name(code)
    except Exception:
        return "Unknown"

# ── UNICEF brand colours ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
UNICEF_BLUE   = "#1CABE2"
UNICEF_YELLOW = "#FFC20E"
PALETTE_CONT  = ["#1CABE2", "#E2711D", "#80BD41", "#FFC20E", "#7B2D8B", "#D7263D"]
CONT_LABELS   = ["Africa", "Asia", "Europe", "North America", "Oceania", "South America"]

# ── Shared custom theme ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def unicef_theme():
    return (
        theme_minimal()
        + theme(
            plot_title       = element_text(size=14, face="bold",  color="#1d3557"),
            plot_subtitle    = element_text(size=11,               color="#457b9d"),
            axis_title       = element_text(size=10,               color="#333333"),
            axis_text        = element_text(size=9,                color="#555555"),
            legend_title     = element_text(size=10, face="bold",  color="#1d3557"),
            legend_text      = element_text(size=9,                color="#333333"),
            legend_background= element_rect(fill="white", color="#cccccc", size=0.4),
            legend_key       = element_rect(fill="white"),
            panel_grid_minor = element_blank(),
            panel_grid_major = element_line(color="#eeeeee"),
            panel_background = element_rect(fill="white"),
            plot_background  = element_rect(fill="white"),
            strip_text       = element_text(size=9, face="bold", color="#1d3557"),
        )
    )

# ── Country centroids (lat, lon) for bubble world map ────────────────────────
CENTROIDS = {
    "AF":(33.93,67.71),"AL":(41.15,20.17),"DZ":(28.03,1.66),"AO":(-11.20,17.87),
    "AR":(-38.42,-63.62),"AM":(40.07,45.04),"AU":(-25.27,133.78),"AT":(47.52,14.55),
    "AZ":(40.14,47.58),"BD":(23.68,90.36),"BE":(50.50,4.47),"BJ":(9.31,2.32),
    "BT":(27.51,90.43),"BO":(-16.29,-63.59),"BA":(43.92,17.68),"BW":(-22.33,24.68),
    "BR":(-14.24,-51.93),"BN":(4.54,114.73),"BG":(42.73,25.49),"BF":(12.36,-1.56),
    "BI":(-3.37,29.92),"CV":(16.54,-23.04),"KH":(12.57,104.99),"CM":(3.85,11.50),
    "CA":(56.13,-106.35),"CF":(6.61,20.94),"TD":(15.45,18.73),"CL":(-35.68,-71.54),
    "CN":(35.86,104.19),"CO":(4.57,-74.30),"KM":(-11.64,43.33),"CG":(-0.23,15.83),
    "CD":(-4.04,21.76),"CR":(9.75,-83.75),"CI":(7.54,-5.55),"HR":(45.10,15.20),
    "CU":(21.52,-77.78),"CY":(35.13,33.43),"CZ":(49.82,15.47),"DK":(56.26,9.50),
    "DJ":(11.83,42.59),"DO":(18.74,-70.16),"EC":(-1.83,-78.18),"EG":(26.82,30.80),
    "SV":(13.79,-88.90),"GQ":(1.65,10.27),"ER":(15.18,39.78),"EE":(58.60,25.01),
    "ET":(9.15,40.49),"FJ":(-16.58,179.41),"FI":(61.92,25.75),"FR":(46.23,2.21),
    "GA":(-0.80,11.61),"GM":(13.44,-15.31),"GE":(42.32,43.36),"DE":(51.17,10.45),
    "GH":(7.95,-1.02),"GR":(39.07,21.82),"GT":(15.78,-90.23),"GN":(9.95,-11.24),
    "GW":(11.80,-15.18),"GY":(4.86,-58.93),"HT":(18.97,-72.29),"HN":(15.20,-86.24),
    "HU":(47.16,19.50),"IS":(64.96,-19.02),"IN":(20.59,78.96),"ID":(-0.79,113.92),
    "IR":(32.43,53.69),"IQ":(33.22,43.68),"IE":(53.41,-8.24),"IL":(31.05,34.85),
    "IT":(41.87,12.57),"JM":(18.11,-77.30),"JP":(36.20,138.25),"JO":(30.59,36.24),
    "KZ":(48.02,66.92),"KE":(-0.02,37.91),"KP":(40.34,127.51),"KR":(35.91,127.77),
    "KW":(29.31,47.48),"KG":(41.20,74.76),"LA":(19.86,102.50),"LV":(56.88,24.60),
    "LB":(33.85,35.86),"LS":(-29.61,28.23),"LR":(6.43,-9.43),"LY":(26.34,17.23),
    "LT":(55.17,23.88),"LU":(49.82,6.13),"MK":(41.61,21.75),"MG":(-18.77,46.87),
    "MW":(-13.25,34.30),"MY":(4.21,108.96),"MV":(3.20,73.22),"ML":(17.57,-3.99),
    "MT":(35.94,14.38),"MR":(21.01,-10.94),"MX":(23.63,-102.55),"MD":(47.41,28.37),
    "MN":(46.86,103.85),"ME":(42.71,19.37),"MA":(31.79,-7.09),"MZ":(-18.67,35.53),
    "MM":(21.91,95.96),"NA":(-22.96,18.49),"NP":(28.39,84.12),"NL":(52.13,5.29),
    "NZ":(-40.90,174.89),"NI":(12.87,-85.21),"NE":(17.61,8.08),"NG":(9.08,8.68),
    "NO":(60.47,8.47),"OM":(21.51,55.92),"PK":(30.38,69.35),"PA":(8.54,-80.78),
    "PG":(-6.31,143.96),"PY":(-23.44,-58.44),"PE":(-9.19,-75.02),"PH":(12.88,121.77),
    "PL":(51.92,19.15),"PT":(39.40,-8.22),"QA":(25.35,51.18),"RO":(45.94,24.97),
    "RU":(61.52,105.32),"RW":(-1.94,29.87),"SA":(23.89,45.08),"SN":(14.50,-14.45),
    "RS":(44.02,21.01),"SL":(8.46,-11.78),"SK":(48.67,19.70),"SI":(46.15,14.99),
    "SO":(5.15,46.20),"ZA":(-30.56,22.94),"SS":(4.86,31.57),"ES":(40.46,-3.75),
    "LK":(7.87,80.77),"SD":(12.86,30.22),"SR":(3.92,-56.03),"SZ":(-26.52,31.47),
    "SE":(60.13,18.64),"CH":(46.82,8.23),"SY":(34.80,38.99),"TJ":(38.86,71.28),
    "TZ":(-6.37,34.89),"TH":(15.87,100.99),"TL":(-8.87,125.73),"TG":(8.62,0.82),
    "TT":(10.69,-61.22),"TN":(33.89,9.54),"TR":(38.96,35.24),"TM":(38.97,59.56),
    "UG":(1.37,32.29),"UA":(48.38,31.17),"AE":(23.42,53.85),"GB":(55.38,-3.44),
    "US":(37.09,-95.71),"UY":(-32.52,-55.77),"UZ":(41.38,64.59),"VE":(6.42,-66.59),
    "VN":(14.06,108.28),"YE":(15.55,48.52),"ZM":(-13.13,27.85),"ZW":(-19.02,29.15),
}


# ── 1. Load all files with Polars ─────────────────────────────────────────────
ind1_raw = pl.read_csv("unicef_indicator_1.csv")
ind2_raw = pl.read_csv("unicef_indicator_2.csv")
meta_raw = pl.read_csv("unicef_metadata.csv")

# ── 2. Rename time_period → year ──────────────────────────────────────────────
ind1 = ind1_raw.rename({"time_period": "year"})
ind2 = ind2_raw.rename({"time_period": "year"})

# ── 3. Add continent column ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
ind1 = ind1.with_columns(
    pl.col("alpha_2_code")
    .map_elements(get_continent, return_dtype=pl.String)
    .alias("continent")
)
ind2 = ind2.with_columns(
    pl.col("alpha_2_code")
    .map_elements(get_continent, return_dtype=pl.String)
    .alias("continent")
)

# ── 4. Slim metadata and left-join to ind1 on country + year ──────────────────
meta_slim = meta_raw.select([
    "country", "year",
    "GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)",
    "Life expectancy at birth, total (years)",
    "Population, total",
    "Birth rate, crude (per 1,000 people)",
])
ind1_meta = ind1.join(meta_slim, on=["country", "year"], how="left")

# ── 5. Summary statistics for narrative ───────────────────────────────────────
n_countries = ind1["country"].n_unique()
n_years     = ind1["year"].n_unique()
year_min    = ind1["year"].min()
year_max    = ind1["year"].max()
global_avg  = round(ind1["obs_value"].mean(), 2)
africa_avg  = round(ind1.filter(pl.col("continent") == "Africa")["obs_value"].mean(), 2)
europe_avg  = round(ind1.filter(pl.col("continent") == "Europe")["obs_value"].mean(), 2)
gap         = round(europe_avg - africa_avg, 2)


latest = (
    ind1
    .sort("year", descending=True)
    .group_by("country")
    .agg(
        pl.col("obs_value").first().alias("latest_value"),
        pl.col("alpha_2_code").first(),
        pl.col("continent").first(),
    )
    .to_pandas()
)

cent_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [{"alpha_2_code": k, "lat": v[0], "lon": v[1]} for k, v in CENTROIDS.items()]
)
map_df = latest.merge(cent_df, on="alpha_2_code", how="inner")

(
    ggplot(map_df, aes(x="lon", y="lat", color="latest_value", size="latest_value"))
    + geom_point(alpha=0.82)
    + scale_color_cmap(
        "Blues",
        name="Sanitation\nCoverage (%)",
        limits=[0, map_df["latest_value"].max()],
    )
    + scale_size_continuous(
        range=[1, 14],
        name="Sanitation\nCoverage (%)",
    )
    + guides(
        color=guide_colorbar(title="Sanitation\nCoverage (%)"),
        size=guide_legend(title="Sanitation\nCoverage (%)"),
    )
    + labs(
        title    = "Global Sanitation Coverage — Most Recent Year Available",
        subtitle = "Each bubble = one country · Colour & size both encode coverage (%)",
        x="Longitude", y="Latitude"
    )
    + theme_void()
    + theme(
        plot_title      = element_text(size=13, face="bold", color="#1d3557"),
        plot_subtitle   = element_text(size=10,              color="#457b9d"),
        legend_title    = element_text(size=9,  face="bold", color="#1d3557"),
        legend_text     = element_text(size=8,               color="#333333"),
        legend_position = "right",
        legend_background = element_rect(fill="white", color="#cccccc", size=0.3),
    )
)


cont_avg = (
    ind1
    .group_by("continent")
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").mean().alias("avg_sanitation"))
    .sort("avg_sanitation", descending=True)
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(cont_avg, aes(x="reorder(continent, avg_sanitation)", y="avg_sanitation", fill="continent"))
    + geom_col(width=0.68, show_legend=True)
    + geom_text(
        aes(label="avg_sanitation"),
        format_string="{:.2f}%",
        ha="left",
        nudge_y=0.08,
        size=9,
        color="#333333",
    )
    + coord_flip()
    + scale_fill_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_y_continuous(limits=[0, 9], name="Average Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Average Sanitation Coverage by Continent (2000–2024)",
        subtitle = "Averaged across all countries and years · Value labels shown at bar ends",
        x        = "",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)


box_df = ind1.to_pandas()

(
    ggplot(box_df, aes(x="continent", y="obs_value", fill="continent", color="continent"))
    + geom_boxplot(alpha=0.55, outlier_size=1.5, outlier_alpha=0.5)
    + scale_fill_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_y_continuous(name="Sanitation Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Distribution of Sanitation Coverage by Continent",
        subtitle = "Each box summarises all country-year observations · Outliers shown as dots",
        x        = "",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(
        axis_text_x  = element_text(angle=25, hjust=1),
        legend_position = "right",
    )
)


yearly_global = (
    ind1
    .group_by("year")
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").mean().alias("global_avg"))
    .sort("year")
    .to_pandas()
)

cont_yearly = (
    ind1
    .group_by(["continent", "year"])
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").mean().alias("avg"))
    .sort("year")
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot()
    + geom_line(
        cont_yearly,
        aes(x="year", y="avg", color="continent"),
        size=0.9, alpha=0.75,
    )
    + geom_line(
        yearly_global,
        aes(x="year", y="global_avg"),
        color="#222222", size=1.5, linetype="solid",
    )
    + geom_smooth(
        yearly_global,
        aes(x="year", y="global_avg"),
        method="lm", color=UNICEF_YELLOW, linetype="dashed", size=1.1, se=False,
    )
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_continuous(breaks=list(range(2000, 2025, 4)))
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage Over Time: Global & Per-Continent (2000–2024)",
        subtitle = "Coloured lines = continent averages · Black line = global mean · Dashed yellow = linear trend",
        x        = "Year",
        y        = "Average Coverage (%)",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)


(
    ggplot(cont_yearly, aes(x="year", y="avg", color="continent"))
    + geom_line(size=1.1)
    + geom_point(size=1.8, alpha=0.8)
    + geom_smooth(method="lm", linetype="dashed", size=0.8, se=False, color="#888888")
    + facet_wrap("continent", ncol=3, scales="free_y")
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_continuous(breaks=[2000, 2008, 2016, 2024])
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage Trajectory by Continent (Faceted)",
        subtitle = "Dashed grey = linear trend per continent · Y-axes free to highlight within-continent change",
        x        = "Year",
        y        = "Avg Coverage (%)",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(
        legend_position = "right",
        axis_text_x     = element_text(size=7, angle=30, hjust=1),
    )
)


scatter_df = (
    ind1_meta
    .filter(pl.col("GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)").is_not_null())
    .filter(pl.col("obs_value").is_not_null())
    .filter(pl.col("GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)") > 0)
    .select([
        "country", "year", "obs_value", "continent",
        "GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)",
    ])
    .rename({"GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)": "gdp_per_capita"})
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(scatter_df, aes(x="gdp_per_capita", y="obs_value", color="continent"))
    + geom_point(alpha=0.25, size=1.4)
    + geom_smooth(method="lm", se=False, size=1.3)
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_log10(
        name="GDP per Capita — log scale (constant 2015 USD)",
        labels=lambda lst: [f"${int(x/1000)}k" if x >= 1000 else f"${int(x)}" for x in lst],
    )
    + scale_y_continuous(name="Sanitation Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage vs. GDP per Capita (Log Scale)",
        subtitle = "Each point = one country-year · Log scale reveals the relationship across income levels",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)


le_df = (
    ind1_meta
    .filter(pl.col("Life expectancy at birth, total (years)").is_not_null())
    .filter(pl.col("obs_value").is_not_null())
    .select([
        "country", "year", "obs_value", "continent",
        "Life expectancy at birth, total (years)",
    ])
    .rename({"Life expectancy at birth, total (years)": "life_expectancy"})
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(le_df, aes(x="life_expectancy", y="obs_value", color="continent"))
    + geom_point(alpha=0.25, size=1.4)
    + geom_smooth(method="lm", se=False, size=1.3)
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_continuous(name="Life Expectancy at Birth (years)")
    + scale_y_continuous(name="Sanitation Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage vs. Life Expectancy",
        subtitle = "Countries where people live longer tend to have better sanitation — but causality runs both ways",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)


br_df = (
    ind1_meta
    .filter(pl.col("Birth rate, crude (per 1,000 people)").is_not_null())
    .filter(pl.col("obs_value").is_not_null())
    .select([
        "country", "year", "obs_value", "continent",
        "Birth rate, crude (per 1,000 people)",
    ])
    .rename({"Birth rate, crude (per 1,000 people)": "birth_rate"})
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(br_df, aes(x="birth_rate", y="obs_value", color="continent"))
    + geom_point(alpha=0.25, size=1.4)
    + geom_smooth(method="lm", se=False, size=1.3)
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_x_continuous(name="Crude Birth Rate (per 1,000 people)")
    + scale_y_continuous(name="Sanitation Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Sanitation Coverage vs. Crude Birth Rate",
        subtitle = "Countries with high birth rates — typically the youngest populations — have the lowest sanitation access",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)


top15 = (
    ind1
    .group_by(["country", "continent"])
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").mean().alias("avg_coverage"))
    .sort("avg_coverage", descending=True)
    .head(15)
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(top15, aes(x="reorder(country, avg_coverage)", y="avg_coverage", fill="continent"))
    + geom_col(width=0.72, show_legend=True)
    + geom_text(
        aes(label="avg_coverage"),
        format_string="{:.1f}%",
        ha="left",
        nudge_y=0.3,
        size=8,
        color="#333333",
    )
    + coord_flip()
    + scale_fill_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_y_continuous(limits=[0, 105], name="Average Coverage (%)")
    + labs(
        title    = "Top 15 Countries: Highest Average Sanitation Coverage (2000–2024)",
        subtitle = "Colour indicates continent · These are the benchmarks others must aspire to",
        x        = "",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)


hiv_cont_yearly = (
    ind2
    .group_by(["continent", "year"])
    .agg(pl.col("obs_value").sum().alias("total_tested"))
    .sort("year")
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(hiv_cont_yearly, aes(x="year", y="total_tested", color="continent"))
    + geom_line(size=1.2)
    + geom_point(size=2.5, alpha=0.9)
    + scale_color_manual(values=PALETTE_CONT, name="Continent")
    + scale_y_continuous(
        name="Women Tested",
        labels=lambda lst: [
            f"{x/1e6:.1f}M" if x >= 1e6 else f"{int(x/1e3)}K" for x in lst
        ],
    )
    + scale_x_continuous(breaks=list(range(2015, 2025, 2)))
    + labs(
        title    = "HIV ANC Testing Volume by Continent (2015–2024)",
        subtitle = "Total pregnant women tested for HIV at antenatal clinics per year",
        x        = "Year",
    )
    + unicef_theme()
    + theme(legend_position="right")
)
